changes: v3.1 adds GASLESS relayed claiming. New EventContract721V3 / EventContract1155V3 templates add a `relayer` role (default = the platform broadcasting wallet) and `claimTicketFor(recipient, [typeId,] claimHash, signature)`: the platform relayer broadcasts and pays the gas, so the holder mints the NFT for 0 GMB and signs only a free off-chain ownership message. The mintSigner signature binds the recipient, so a compromised relayer cannot redirect a mint; on-chain usedClaims[claimHash] + DB nftClaimed make double-mint impossible. The original client-pays `claimTicket` is preserved UNCHANGED. PlatformRegistry repointed (setTemplate) to the V3 templates — new events clone V3; existing (immutable) events keep client-pays. Same PlatformRegistry, mintSigner, Claim singleton and roles. Zero platform fees.

EventContract721.type: template (EIP-1167) — legacy v2, no longer cloned by the registry

EventContract1155.type: template (EIP-1167) — legacy v2, no longer cloned by the registry

configuration.relayer: 0x8eB8Bf106EbC9834a2586D04F73866C7436Ce298 (= platformSigner; default on every V3 clone, owner-changeable via setRelayer)
configuration.claimFlow: GASLESS: holder signs a free off-chain ownership message -> backend POST /api/claim/relay -> mintSigner signs (contract,[typeId,]claimHash,recipient) -> relayer broadcasts claimTicketFor() and pays gas -> NFT minted to the holder for 0 GMB. Original client-pays claimTicket preserved (route disabled).
configuration.payments: All payments via GembaPay (contracts are payment-agnostic); 0 platform fees
configuration.gas: Negligible — GembaBlockchain native gas ~0; relayer sponsors mint gas so holders pay/sign nothing on-chain
configuration.nft: Multi-page NFT — poster image + on-chain event details (attributes) + interactive QR page (animation_url)
